name: ccc-agent.service
description: CCC Agent Pull Service — runs agent-pull.sh every 10 minutes via ccc-agent.timer

name: ccc-agent.timer
description: CCC Agent Pull Timer — fires ccc-agent.service every 10 minutes

name: ccc-dashboard.service
description: CCC dashboard frontend (Vite dev or static serve)

name: agent-listener.service
description: ClawBus agent-listener — subscribes to ClawBus and dispatches tasks

name: clawfs-metrics-push.service
description: ClawFS/agentOS metrics push — streams Prometheus metrics to ClawBus every 5s

name: clawfs-sparky.service
description: ClawFS FUSE mount for sparky GPU node

name: clawfs-sync.service
description: ClawFS sync service — syncs JuiceFS metadata to MinIO backend

name: heartbeat-local.service
description: Local heartbeat for sparky — posts GPU/system metrics to CCC hub

name: ollama-keepalive.service
description: Ollama keepalive — prevents Ollama from unloading models on sparky

name: slack-reflector.service
description: Slack bridge reflector — mirrors Slack messages to ClawBus

name: sparky-reverse-tunnel.service
description: SSH reverse tunnel from sparky back to do-host1 hub

name: ssh-tunnel-do-host1.service
description: SSH tunnel to do-host1 for CI/CD access

name: whisper-natasha.service
description: Whisper transcription service on natasha node

name: com.ccc.agent.plist
description: macOS LaunchAgent — runs agent-pull.sh every 10 minutes
label: com.ccc.agent

name: com.ccc.claude-main.plist
description: macOS LaunchAgent — keeps a tmux claude-main session alive with Claude Code
label: com.ccc.claude-main
